description: Update the public documentation site to cover all new SDK utilities (getAuthCache, setAuthCache, clearAuthCache, fetchText, getMetaContent, buildQueryString, findLocalStorageEntry), add a 'when to use which fetch utility' decision guide, document httpStatusToToolError in the plugin development guide, and add documentation for the homepage and excludePatterns plugin properties.
qualityChecks: cd docs && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run knip && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Add new SDK utilities to the utilities reference page
userStories.description: Add documentation for the five new SDK utilities to docs/content/docs/sdk/utilities.mdx.
acceptanceCriteria: Storage section includes getAuthCache, setAuthCache, clearAuthCache with signatures, descriptions, and usage example
Storage section includes findLocalStorageEntry with signature, description, and usage example
Fetch section includes fetchText with signature, description, and example
Fetch section includes buildQueryString with signature, description, and example
DOM section includes getMetaContent with signature, description, and example
userStories.notes:
Files:
- docs/content/docs/sdk/utilities.mdx

Follow the existing documentation style exactly — each utility gets a ### heading, a TypeScript signature code block, a description paragraph, and a usage example code block.

Constraints:
- Do NOT change the existing utility documentation — only add new sections
- Follow the exact heading and code block style used by existing utilities on the page

userStories.title: Add fetch utility decision guide and httpStatusToToolError to plugin development guide
userStories.description: Add a 'Choosing the right fetch utility' subsection and document httpStatusToToolError in the error handling section.
acceptanceCriteria: Plugin development guide has a decision table for choosing fetch utilities
The guide explains that credentials:'include' is automatic
httpStatusToToolError is documented in the error handling section with example
The guide mentions that all fetch utilities have a 30-second default timeout
userStories.notes:
Files:
- docs/content/docs/guides/plugin-development.mdx

Add a decision table:
| Need | Use |
|------|-----|
| GET + JSON response | `fetchJSON` |
| POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE + JSON | `postJSON` / `putJSON` / `patchJSON` / `deleteJSON` |
| POST + URL-encoded form | `postForm` |
| POST + multipart file upload | `postFormData` |
| GET + text response (diffs, logs) | `fetchText` |
| Custom request handling | `fetchFromPage` (raw Response) |
| Build URL query parameters | `buildQueryString` |

Constraints:
- Do NOT remove the existing raw fetch example — it's still valid for context

userStories.title: Document homepage and excludePatterns in plugin class reference
userStories.description: Add documentation for the homepage and excludePatterns properties to the plugin class reference page.
acceptanceCriteria: homepage property documented with description and example
excludePatterns property documented with description and example
userStories.notes:
Files:
- docs/content/docs/sdk/plugin-class.mdx

From platform/plugin-sdk/src/index.ts:
- `excludePatterns`: Chrome match patterns for URLs that should NOT match. Useful when a broad urlPattern overlaps with another plugin's domain.
- `homepage`: URL to open when no matching tab exists and the user triggers an 'open tab' action from the side panel.

Constraints:
- Place these after urlPatterns to keep logical grouping
- Mark them clearly as optional
